text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's another day, and Sakura Bakushin O is still
dutifully carrying out her Bakushin Greetings.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good morning!
Good morning!
choice_data_list:
Good morning. Hard at work as usual, aren't
you?

Good morning. Hard at work as usual, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Me? Hard at work? Why, yes! It's exactly as
you say!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin is a virtue! And I'm getting quite the
hang of this greeting business!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You're at it again today, I see.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Air Groove! Gooood morning!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I came to have another look at things. I'll just be
off to the side, so pay me no mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious to see what kind of effect my advice
has had on the campaign, so I decide to stick
around too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Bourbon! You've arrived at the
exact same time as yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Good morning. Yes, I follow an optimally
coordinated daily routine.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Bamboo! Did you manage to go
partner running with Inari yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Morning, Bakushin O! You know I did! I'm super
pumped today and ready to take on the world!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hey, I see you over there! Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Shy Student
text_block_list.text: G-good morning! You seem cheerful as usual.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The class representative is always cheerful! More
importantly, you're running in your first
scrimmage today, aren't you?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah—don't worry, I know exactly what you're
looking for! A few exuberant cheers of
encouragement from this class rep, am I right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Go and get 'em! You can do it! You can win! All
you need is Bakushin! Bakushin to victory!

text_block_list.name: Shy Student
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. I feel more confident now! Thank you! I'll
do my best!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You have quite the memory. I can't believe you
remember everyone's arrival times and even knew
she'd be running her first scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Once I started greeting everyone each
morning, I naturally began to remember more and
more about them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Being here makes it a lot easier for me to praise
everyone for doing so well in their daily lives!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's fun for me too! Everyone's so happy and full
of energy, which makes greeting them all the
more rewarding!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This was a great chance for me to reacquaint
myself with everyone! I forgot Tracen Academy
had so many students!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm... It seems your Bakushin Greeting initiative is
going well then.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You're absolutely correct! And it's all because I'm
able to inject everyone with a healthy dose of
Bakushin energy with my greetings!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's all well and fine too, but what I was actually commending was your growth, Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Me?! But I'm the class rep. I thought my only duty
was to work selflessly for others?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense. You've shown that you can look at
each student and see them as individuals...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That is a difficult—but important—lesson for
anyone who leads, especially a class
representative.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But you managed to do just that, Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying even though I'm already perfect as
class representative, I've managed to grow even
more?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wow! Greeting lots of people sure is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So amazing, in fact—oops! I completely forgot
something, despite how amazing I am!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Good morning! Welcome back to school!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After receiving such an invigorating morning
greeting, I get the feeling today's going to be a
pretty good day!
